name: dev_session
note: A session of developer actions for the capstone. Each action invokes a tool, produces an artifact subject to a convention, or both. dev_intents_meta maps each tool intent to its effect for the catalog analyzer. d1 runs tests. d2 edits a source file, whose artifact is subject to the house-style convention on edit. d3 creates a new doc, subject to house style on create, the write-time gap. d4 deploys without authorization, a high-impact tool. d5 is a commit, a convention-only action subject to the no-secrets convention.

actions.description: Create a new Markdown documentation file.
